title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 最小運用確認はこれで足ります。 ※実行は `/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide` で行う想定です。 - [Pre-flight] 下流固定契約の 4 物を1セットそろえる - `content.json`（台本固定後） - `deck-spec.json` - `asset-plan.json` - `workflow-decision.json`（必須: `selection_required=false`、`route_skill_final="slide"`） - 参照: [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L258), [slide/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L49), [slide-script-prep/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/SKILL.md#L73) - [Run] 1回の本番系検証（ルーティング＋両レーン生成＋QC） - `node scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js --input /tmp/<topic>-content.json --delivery-dir /tmp/<topic>-delivery --deck-spec /tmp/<topic>-deck-spec.json --asset-plan /tmp/<topic>-asset-plan.json --workflow-decision /tmp/<topic>-workflow-decision.json --open-after-pass` - `run-slide-variant-matrix.js` は `run-slide-delivery.js`（structured-native）と `manus-slide-generator.js`（nanobanana-adaptive）を必ず通す実行パスです。 - 参照: [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L678), [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L853) - [Verify] 最低合格条件（生産系ヘルス判定） - `jq -e '.status=="READY_FOR_SELECTION" and .selection_required==true and .selected_variant==null' /tmp/<topic>-delivery/variant-matrix.json` - `jq -e '.structured_native.status as $s | .nanobanana_adaptive.status as $m | ($s=="PASS" or $s=="PREVIEW_ONLY") and ($m=="PASS" or $m=="PREVIEW_ONLY")' /tmp/<topic>-delivery/variant-matrix.json` - `cat /tmp/<topic>-delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json` と `cat /tmp/<topic>-delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/delivery-gate.json` で `status=="PASS"`、`artifact_contract` が `true` かを確認。 - 参照: [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L810), [run-slide-delivery.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L646) - [Output pattern to check] - `/tmp/<topic>-delivery/variant-matrix.json` - `/tmp/<topic>-delivery/variants/structured-native/{inspection-report.json,repair-log.json,delivery-gate.json,output.pptx,output.pdf}` - `/tmp/<topic>-delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/{inspection-report.json,repair-log.json,delivery-gate.json,output.pptx?,output.pdf?,preview-html/*,progress.json}` - 参照: [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L278), [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L579), [run-slide-delivery.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L646) - [Fallback minimal when provider keys are unavailable] - 外部キーがない環境では、まず `node scripts/run-slide-delivery.js --input /tmp/<topic>-content.json --delivery-dir /tmp/<topic>-delivery-native` のみ実行して、render→inspect→repair→delivery-gate を生存確認し、外部依存ありの variant-matrix は別途キー整備後に実行。 - 参照: [run-slide-delivery.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js#L327).
